pi_items.verified_value: export_result.sh line 101 uses pattern 'openice|simul|integrat' which includes 'integrat' not listed in metadata
pi_items.source: Discrepancy found: task.json lists tool=['openice','simulation'] but export_result.sh checks for pattern matching 'integrat' (lines 101-102)

privileged_info_summary: The task 'adverse_event_rca_reconstruction@1' uses OpenICE, an open-source medical device integration platform from MD PnP at Massachusetts General Hospital, available at https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp. The task requires the agent to create two simulated medical devices: a Pulse Oximeter (measures SpO2 and heart rate only) and a Multiparameter Monitor (measures multiple vital signs including blood pressure). The clinical scenario is accurate: hypotension (low blood pressure) would go undetected if a patient is monitored only with a pulse oximeter and the multiparameter monitor is disconnected. The task requires writing an RCA report to /home/ga/Desktop/rca_report.txt describing the incident, monitoring gap, root cause, corrective actions, and OpenICE observations. All clinical keywords in metadata are verified as appropriate and aligned with the task description. Data is entirely synthetic (simulated scenario in OpenICE framework with no external patient datasets). A discrepancy exists: the verifier script checks for 'integrat' in report content but this keyword is not listed in the metadata 'tool' field (only 'openice' and 'simulation' are listed), potentially allowing false positives from 'interactive' or 'integration' terms.
